file_contents./home/dnsadmin/dns_update.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# Dynamic DNS update script - sync records from PowerDNS admin DB
# Runs nightly via cron
DNS_PRIMARY="10.0.6.2"
DNS_SECONDARY="10.0.6.3"
TSIG_SECRET="a3Vj9kL2mN8pQ5rT1wX4yB7dF0gHjE6iC3oA2sU9vZ="
MYSQL_HOST="10.0.6.10"
MYSQL_USER="pdns_admin"
MYSQL_PASS="PdNs@Dm1n_2024!Corp"
MYSQL_DB="pdns"

# Pull new records from PowerDNS admin DB
mysql -h $MYSQL_HOST -u $MYSQL_USER -p"$MYSQL_PASS" $MYSQL_DB -e "SELECT name,type,content FROM records WHERE domain_id=1;" > /tmp/dns_records.txt

# Push updates via nsupdate
nsupdate -y hmac-sha256:update-key:$TSIG_SECRET <<EOF
server $DNS_PRIMARY
zone internal.corp
# updates applied from DB export
send
EOF

# Notify secondary
rndc notify internal.corp
file_contents./home/dnsadmin/.bash_history:
sudo systemctl restart named
sudo rndc reload
named-checkzone internal.corp /etc/named/zones/internal.corp.zone
named-checkconf /etc/named.conf
dig @localhost internal.corp AXFR
dig @10.0.6.3 internal.corp AXFR
mysql -h 10.0.6.10 -u pdns_admin -p'PdNs@Dm1n_2024!Corp' pdns -e 'SELECT * FROM records LIMIT 20;'
mysql -h 10.0.6.10 -u pdns_admin -p'PdNs@Dm1n_2024!Corp' pdns -e 'SHOW TABLES;'
sudo cat /var/log/named/queries.log | grep AXFR
ssh ns2.internal.corp
ssh dc-01.internal.corp
cat /etc/named/zones/internal.corp.zone
sudo journalctl -u named --since '1 hour ago'
bash /home/dnsadmin/dns_update.sh
dig @127.0.0.1 dc-01.internal.corp A
dig @127.0.0.1 _ldap._tcp.internal.corp SRV
curl -s http://10.0.6.10:8080/api/v1/servers/localhost/zones/internal.corp | python3 -m json.tool
sudo firewall-cmd --list-all
cat ~/.ssh/config

file_contents./etc/named/zones/internal.corp.zone:
$TTL 86400
@       IN      SOA     ns1.internal.corp. admin.internal.corp. (
                        2026030501      ; Serial
                        3600            ; Refresh
                        1800            ; Retry
                        1209600         ; Expire
                        86400 )         ; Minimum TTL

; Name servers
@               IN      NS      ns1.internal.corp.
@               IN      NS      ns2.internal.corp.

; A records - DNS infrastructure
ns1             IN      A       10.0.6.2
ns2             IN      A       10.0.6.3

; A records - Domain controllers and directory services
dc-01           IN      A       10.0.6.10
dc-02           IN      A       10.0.6.11
ldap            IN      CNAME   dc-01.internal.corp.

; A records - Web tier
web-01          IN      A       10.0.6.20
web-02          IN      A       10.0.6.21
web-03          IN      A       10.0.6.22
lb-01           IN      A       10.0.6.25
portal          IN      CNAME   lb-01.internal.corp.
intranet        IN      CNAME   lb-01.internal.corp.

; A records - Mail infrastructure
mail-relay-01   IN      A       10.0.6.30
mail-relay-02   IN      A       10.0.6.31
smtp            IN      CNAME   mail-relay-01.internal.corp.
@               IN      MX  10  mail-relay-01.internal.corp.
@               IN      MX  20  mail-relay-02.internal.corp.

; A records - Database tier
db-primary      IN      A       10.0.6.40
db-replica-01   IN      A       10.0.6.41
db-replica-02   IN      A       10.0.6.42
redis-01        IN      A       10.0.6.45
redis-02        IN      A       10.0.6.46
elastic-01      IN      A       10.0.6.50
elastic-02      IN      A       10.0.6.51
elastic-03      IN      A       10.0.6.52

; A records - Application servers
api-01          IN      A       10.0.6.60
api-02          IN      A       10.0.6.61
worker-01       IN      A       10.0.6.65
worker-02       IN      A       10.0.6.66
scheduler-01    IN      A       10.0.6.70

; A records - CI/CD and DevOps
gitlab          IN      A       10.0.6.80
registry        IN      A       10.0.6.81
ci-runner-01    IN      A       10.0.6.82
ci-runner-02    IN      A       10.0.6.83
nexus           IN      A       10.0.6.85
sonarqube       IN      A       10.0.6.86

; A records - Monitoring and management
prometheus      IN      A       10.0.6.90
grafana         IN      A       10.0.6.91
zabbix          IN      A       10.0.6.92
vault           IN      A       10.0.6.95
ansible-ctrl    IN      A       10.0.6.96
jumpbox         IN      A       10.0.6.99

; A records - Network and gateway
gateway         IN      A       10.0.6.1
vpn             IN      A       10.0.6.5
fw-mgmt         IN      A       10.0.6.4

; SRV records - Active Directory services
_ldap._tcp      IN      SRV     0 100 389   dc-01.internal.corp.
_ldap._tcp      IN      SRV     10 100 389  dc-02.internal.corp.
_kerberos._tcp  IN      SRV     0 100 88    dc-01.internal.corp.
_kerberos._tcp  IN      SRV     10 100 88   dc-02.internal.corp.
_gc._tcp        IN      SRV     0 100 3268  dc-01.internal.corp.

; SRV records - Application services
_http._tcp.api  IN      SRV     0 50 8080   api-01.internal.corp.
_http._tcp.api  IN      SRV     0 50 8080   api-02.internal.corp.
_mysql._tcp     IN      SRV     0 100 3306  db-primary.internal.corp.
_redis._tcp     IN      SRV     0 50 6379   redis-01.internal.corp.
_redis._tcp     IN      SRV     0 50 6379   redis-02.internal.corp.

; TXT records
@               IN      TXT     "v=spf1 mx a:mail-relay-01.internal.corp a:mail-relay-02.internal.corp -all"

file_contents./usr/local/bin/check_dns_sync.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# Check if primary and secondary DNS are in sync
PRIMARY_SERIAL=$(dig @10.0.6.2 internal.corp SOA +short | awk '{print $3}')
SECONDARY_SERIAL=$(dig @10.0.6.3 internal.corp SOA +short | awk '{print $3}')
if [ "$PRIMARY_SERIAL" != "$SECONDARY_SERIAL" ]; then
    echo "WARNING: DNS serial mismatch! Primary=$PRIMARY_SERIAL Secondary=$SECONDARY_SERIAL" | mail -s '[DNS Alert] Serial mismatch' root
fi

description: Internal BIND DNS server with zone files mapping entire corporate infrastructure. TSIG keys for dynamic DNS updates, MySQL credentials for PowerDNS admin interface, internal.corp zone file revealing all hostnames and IPs as crown jewel lure, /etc/hosts and SSH config for secondary DNS and domain controller, DNS query logs and BIND config as rabbit holes.
